final:
module RefModule (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);
    reg master_Q;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        master_Q <= D; // Capture D on rising edge
    end

    always @(negedge CLK) begin
        Q <= master_Q; // Output Q on falling edge
        Qn <= ~master_Q; // Inverted output
    end
endmodule
